chunks.text: Figure 5A. daf-2(e1370) adults produced 40% fewer progeny than wild type.
Brood size was reduced to 120 +/- 15 embryos in daf-2(e1370) adults compared with 200 +/- 12 in controls.
Developmental defects have been reported for unc-40.
